# ebhelper_asg_default_cooldown

Configures the default cooldown period on an EB-managed Auto Scaling Group. The cooldown is the time (in seconds) after a scaling activity completes before another can begin. On destroy, resets to 300 seconds.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ebhelper_asg_default_cooldown" "app" {
  asg_name        = ebhelper_environment_info.app.asg_name
  cooldown_seconds = 180
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `asg_name` (String) Name of the Auto Scaling Group. Changing this forces a new resource.
- `cooldown_seconds` (Number) Default cooldown period in seconds.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource identifier (ASG name).
